description:
Repeated patterns in Store that could be helpers:
- item_key/1: {item.priority, item.vesting_time, item.id} - 5 occurrences
- reposition_item/5: clear old key, write new key - 3 occurrences  
- update_pointer/4: pack pointer key, call repo.min - 4 occurrences
- verify_lease_ownership/4: fetch lease, check ID match - 5 occurrences

Lower priority since these are internal helpers, not public API changes.
title: Extract Store helper functions
